title: UPS India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: UPS India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!
